signflip_perm_nonzero.caveat: not a clean null for improvement pairs (positive by construction); shown as stress only

skip_leg_exact.verdict: claimed 0.034 came from iid bootstrap of 8 EV values; exact binomial is 3x larger

split_stability.note: time split-half stable, but one of four days is negative and odd/even alternation spreads 3.5-17.6c; effective information ~2.5 days, no pre-registrable held-out split possible at n=34

multiplicity_accounting.primary_contrast: impulse_v2 vs impulse50 policy delta: legitimately pre-deployed A/B (impulse50 added to bot 2026-07-10 as flat-stake twin, bot line 142) and one of 2 pre-specified primaries in the misses module
multiplicity_accounting.three_analyst_replication: NOT independent evidence: flagship/misses/micro all recount the identical 26-34 trades; treat as 1 test
multiplicity_accounting.cap_boundary_selection: the 47c action threshold is qhat-derived IN-window (qlo 0.5057->0.5068 learned nightly on these same trades); boundaries 40/44/45/47/48/50/53/54/55/56 appear across the round (K>=8 candidate caps); 47c was never pre-registered
multiplicity_accounting.module_level_K: flagship self-reports K~8, misses K~35, micro a7 ~8 more; headline survives because it was a primary, but every sub-leg p-value (skip 0.034, cap53-miss 0.013) is best-of-subscan

verdict.headline_arithmetic: CONFIRMED (+10.55c/share-signal reproduces exactly from raw ledger; $362 pnl gap; 0 v2-only t0s)
verdict.skip_leg_significance: REFUTED as stated: claimed p(EV>=0)=0.034 came from iid bootstrap of n=8 EV values; exact binomial gives p=0.109 vs break-even q*=0.53 and p=0.145 vs q=0.5
verdict.variance_understatement: mild: 1h blocks p=0.017, 3h blocks p=0.057, 12h p=0.032; not fatal but claimed p=0.016 is the most favorable block choice
verdict.r2_double_count: partially confirmed: under R2 own pooled rich-fill q=0.4656 (n=436) the skip leg is worth +1.5c/signal, not the observed +6.6c; ~5.1c/signal of the headline is 2-of-8 binomial luck
verdict.cap47_boundary: NOT supported: flat-arm v3 bands show no monotone toxicity at 48c (40-48c: -7.3c/sh n=33; 48-53c: -6.7c n=98; 53-56c: -1.1c n=29, wr .552); cap53-missed signals won 10/12 in the same round
verdict.honest_effect: +4 to +6c/share-signal: +3.9c mechanical re-poll price improvement (+2.8c excluding the single 37.9c outlier pair) plus +1.0-1.5c expected skip avoidance under pooled rich-fill q
